channel.title: Adil Waheed - Full-Stack MERN Developer | Frontend Developer | React.js | Next.js | WordPress | AI Automation
channel.description: Full-Stack MERN Developer (FE Focused) | Frontend Developer | React.js Developer | Next.js Developer | WordPress Developer | AI Automation Specialist with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications using React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026 Adil Waheed. All rights reserved.

item.title: ExactFlow App

item.title: 92 Limo

item.title: Expenser App
item.description: An expense tracking web application built with Next.js and Firebase Firestore. The app allows users to manage their personal finances by adding, viewing, and deleting expenses in real time, with persistent cloud-based data storage. item.title: Dowell Classification API

item.description: Developed the frontend interface for Dowell's Email API, focused on enabling efficient testing and validation of API responses.
